title: Shrimp Noodle Salad with Citrus Vinaigrette
description: A refreshing, citrusy, and easy-to-make salad featuring Croatian-style noodles and succulent shrimp.

ingredients.name: Croatian noodles
ingredients.notes: such as homemade or store-bought noodles

instructions: Cook the Croatian noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the chopped parsley and dill, and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, shrimp, parsley mixture, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Toss to combine and adjust seasoning as needed.
